name: Saucy Bean'n Beef Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Mix the meat, half the onions, bread crumbs, 1/4 cup of the soup, egg, thyme leaves, salt, and pepper in a bowl until combined evenly.
3. Pour the mixture into an ungreased 9-inch pie pan, pressing it evenly against the bottom and sides.
4. Spread the drained green beans over the meat layer.
5. Drizzle the remaining soup over the green beans.
6. Bake, uncovered, for 35 minutes.
7. Sprinkle the remaining onions on top of the mixture.
8. Continue baking for another 10 minutes.
9. Allow to cool for about 5 minutes before cutting into wedges and serving.
